\tzpentry{ID3778}{Delta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3778 introduces Delta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \delta\Lambda(\omega)=\frac{\alpha}{\kappa+i\omega}\,U(\omega), \end{equation}
